detection_signals: medical records, patient data, clinical, diagnosis, HIPAA, FDA, EHR, HL7, FHIR
key_concerns: data encryption at rest and transit, audit logging, access control, consent management
compliance_requirements: HIPAA, HITECH, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, GDPR (if EU)
mandatory_questions: What PHI data is handled? Who has access? Audit trail requirements? Data retention policy?

detection_signals: payments, banking, trading, KYC, AML, PCI, transactions, ledger, financial data
key_concerns: PCI-DSS compliance, transaction integrity, fraud detection, audit trail, data isolation
compliance_requirements: PCI-DSS, SOX, KYC/AML regulations, PSD2 (if EU)
mandatory_questions: What financial data is processed? Payment processor? Transaction volume? Regulatory jurisdiction?

detection_signals: government, public sector, citizen, FedRAMP, FISMA, classified, clearance
key_concerns: data sovereignty, accessibility (Section 508), audit compliance, multi-factor auth
mandatory_questions: Data classification level? Hosting jurisdiction requirements? Accessibility mandates?

detection_signals: legal documents, case management, attorney-client, discovery, compliance, contracts
key_concerns: privilege protection, document retention, chain of custody, audit trail
compliance_requirements: varies by jurisdiction, attorney-client privilege, data retention laws
mandatory_questions: What privileged data is handled? Retention requirements? Multi-jurisdiction?

detection_signals: insurance, claims, underwriting, policies, actuarial, risk assessment
key_concerns: data privacy, regulatory reporting, claims integrity, fraud detection
compliance_requirements: varies by jurisdiction, NAIC, Solvency II (if EU)
mandatory_questions: What policyholder data? Regulatory reporting requirements? Claims workflow?

detection_signals: education, students, courses, grades, LMS, COPPA, FERPA, minors
key_concerns: minor data protection, parental consent, accessibility, data minimization
mandatory_questions: Are users minors? Parental consent flow? Student data handling?

detection_signals: shop, cart, checkout, products, orders, inventory, shipping
key_concerns: payment security, inventory consistency, order integrity, user data protection
compliance_requirements: PCI-DSS (if handling cards), GDPR (if EU), consumer protection laws
mandatory_questions: Payment processing method? Order volume? Inventory management? Return policy?

detection_signals: multi-tenant, subscription, billing, workspace, organization, team, seats
key_concerns: tenant isolation, billing integrity, data separation, SSO/SAML
mandatory_questions: Multi-tenancy model? Tenant data isolation? SSO requirements? Billing model?

detection_signals: sensor, device, telemetry, firmware, embedded, MQTT, edge
key_concerns: device authentication, firmware updates, data volume, edge processing, physical security
compliance_requirements: varies by industry, CE marking, FCC
mandatory_questions: Device count? Communication protocol? Firmware update strategy? Data volume?

detection_signals: buyers, sellers, listings, reviews, disputes, commission, escrow
key_concerns: dual-sided trust, payment escrow, fraud prevention, content moderation
mandatory_questions: Dispute resolution? Payment flow? Seller verification? Content moderation?

detection_signals: internal, backoffice, admin, dashboard, employees, operations
key_concerns: usability, reliability, integration with existing systems
mandatory_questions: Who are the internal users? Integration with existing systems? Auth (SSO/LDAP)?

detection_signals: blog, CMS, articles, media, publishing, editorial
key_concerns: content delivery, SEO, caching, editorial workflow
mandatory_questions: Traffic expectations? Content types? Editorial workflow? CDN needs?

detection_signals: none of the above signals detected
